annotations.label: Rank–nullity theorem (statement)

anchor.snippet: the number of columns of a matrix

annotations.note: Direct finrank-form statement that range and kernel dimensions add to the domain dimension.

annotations.label: Injectivity/surjectivity implies bijectivity

anchor.snippet: either injectivity or surjectivity implies bijectivity

annotations.note: States that for finite-dimensional spaces of equal dimension, injectivity equals surjectivity for a linear map.

annotations.label: Rank–nullity for linear transformations
annotations.note: Direct cardinal-valued rank-nullity for a linear map under HasRankNullity.

annotations.label: Refinement via splitting lemma (isomorphism form)

anchor.snippet: This theorem can be refined via the splitting lemma

annotations.note: First isomorphism theorem giving the explicit linear equivalence M/ker f ≃ₗ range f.

annotations.label: Rank–nullity for matrices
annotations.note: No dedicated Matrix-level rank-nullity statement; it follows by applying the linear-map version to Matrix.mulVecLin (used internally in Matrix/Rank.lean).

annotations.label: First proof (general case via linear maps)
annotations.note: Mathlib's proof in Dimension/RankNullity follows the abstract argument extending a kernel basis.

annotations.label: Second proof (homogeneous system)
annotations.note: The article's specific homogeneous-system proof via a null-space basis matrix N is not present as a separate proof.

annotations.label: Codomain need not be finite-dimensional

anchor.snippet: there is no such assumption on the codomain

annotations.note: Mathlib's statement requires no finiteness on the codomain M₁, matching this remark.

annotations.label: Extension of kernel basis to full basis
annotations.note: Extends a linearly independent set (e.g., a kernel basis) to a basis of the whole space.

annotations.label: Images of extension vectors form a basis of image
annotations.note: No named lemma for the basis-of-range claim, but it appears implicitly in the rank-nullity proof.

annotations.label: Linear independence of image vectors
annotations.note: No standalone Mathlib lemma; this independence sub-step appears only inside the rank-nullity proof.

annotations.label: Existence of n−r linearly independent null-space solutions
annotations.note: A basis of LinearMap.ker exists with cardinality n−r by combining finrank-rank-nullity with Module.finBasisOfFinrankEq; no single named statement.

annotations.label: Every solution is a linear combination of these solutions

anchor.snippet: That every other solution is a linear combination

annotations.note: This is just the spanning property of a kernel basis; no specific named lemma stating it as in the article.

annotations.label: Construction of null-space basis matrix N

anchor.snippet: whose columns form a basis of the null space

annotations.note: No Mathlib decl constructs an explicit null-space basis matrix N for a given matrix A.

annotations.label: Rank factorization of dependent columns
annotations.note: No 'rank factorization' decomposition A = CF appears in Mathlib's Matrix.Rank library.

annotations.label: Columns of N are particular solutions
annotations.note: No matrix-level statement that the columns of a null-space basis matrix satisfy AN = 0.

annotations.label: Columns of N are linearly independent
annotations.note: No named lemma asserts the column independence of a null-space basis matrix N.

annotations.label: Cokernel of a linear transformation
annotations.note: Cokernel is represented as the quotient M₂ ⧸ LinearMap.range f; no top-level `LinearMap.cokernel` definition in linear algebra, only via category-theoretic ModuleCat or presentations.

annotations.label: Fundamental theorem of linear algebra
annotations.note: No single named decl bundling the four-subspace dimension identities for a matrix as Strang's fundamental theorem.

annotations.label: Equivalence with first isomorphism theorem
annotations.note: First isomorphism theorem for modules is provided as a linear equivalence.

annotations.label: Short exact sequences of vector spaces split

anchor.snippet: each short exact sequence of vector spaces splits

annotations.note: Mathlib provides a basis construction from a short exact sequence of free modules; vector-space-specific splitting isn't a single named theorem.

annotations.label: Alternating sum of dimensions in an exact sequence

anchor.snippet: this formulation is susceptible to a generalization

annotations.note: Only the 3-term short-exact case is formalized; no general alternating-sum statement over an arbitrary-length exact sequence.

annotations.label: Index of a linear map

anchor.snippet: The index of a linear map

annotations.note: No `LinearMap.index` or Fredholm-index definition is present in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Rank–nullity as index identity
annotations.note: Without an index definition, the index-form of rank-nullity (index = dim T − dim S) is not stated in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Atiyah–Singer index theorem
annotations.note: The Atiyah–Singer index theorem is not formalized in Mathlib.
